tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: They're asking me to redo my part because they're busy, which is totally fine since I know I'm better at it anyway.

desires: Not feel like I'm the only one pulling weight tonight, even if it means doing their work for free.
Get this done before I collapse from sleep debt tomorrow so I don't have to explain my exhaustion to anyone.

goals.description: Finish my own project share by 18:30, then immediately start teammate_A's work (even if it's just copying/pasting their messy notes into a clean doc) so they don't have to ask me tomorrow.
goals.rationale: I can't let them feel like the only one pulling weight; doing their part now builds trust with teammate_A even if I'm tired. Plus, getting this done before bed prevents me from having to explain my exhaustion to anyone tomorrow.

goals.description: Go eat dinner with cohort_3 right after finishing the extra task. No talking about grades or stress, just food and noise.
goals.rationale: Health is important, but relationships are way more important. If I skip the meal because I'm 'working,' I'll feel guilty and they'll think I'm distant. Eating now resets my energy for the night without needing to plan far ahead.

agent.last_reasoning: Teammate_A asked for help, and I can't let them feel like the only one pulling weight. Finishing their messy notes now builds trust with teammate_A even though it's tired work. Skipping this would hurt our relationship more than my current stress.
